name: Zucchini Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Thawed Frozen Grape Juice Concentrate
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the mashed banana, grated zucchini, thawed grape juice concentrate, fresh lemon juice, and vanilla extract. Blend well.
3. In a separate large bowl, mix together the whole wheat pastry flour, baking soda, baking powder, grated lemon zest, and ground cinnamon.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until thoroughly combined.
5. Pour the batter into a nonstick 8x4-inch loaf pan and bake for about 1-1/4 hours, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Let cool in the pan for 10 minutes. Gently loosen the sides with a spatula, invert the pan, and remove the bread.
7. Cool completely on a rack.
Makes one loaf.
